# Sonamart - Premium Stone Procurement Platform

## Project Overview
Sonamart is a luxury e-commerce and B2B procurement platform for premium stone materials (marble, granite, quartz). Built with Next.js 15, Tailwind CSS v4, and a sophisticated design language.

## Design Language
- **Palette**: Deep obsidian/slate blacks, rich cream/off-white backgrounds, warm metallic accents (muted champagne gold, soft amber)
- **Typography**: Serif/geometric sans-serif for headings (Playfair Display or Cormorant Garamond style), clean sans-serif for UI (Inter or Geist)
- **Layout**: Generous whitespace, editorial-style layouts, clean borders, subtle gradients
- **Animations**: Smooth, organic Framer Motion transitions (fade-ins, staggered lists, hover scales)
- **Responsiveness**: Mobile-first, fully responsive with loading skeletons

## Tech Stack
- Next.js 15 (App Router)
- Tailwind CSS v4
- TypeScript
- shadcn/ui
- Framer Motion
- React

## Development Standards
- All components must follow the luxury aesthetic strictly
- Component structure: `/src/components` with subdirectories by feature
- Hooks in `/src/hooks`, utilities in `/src/lib`, types in `/src/types`
- Every component includes loading skeleton versions
- Dark mode support aligned with luxury palette
